meaning: vt.涂上水银adj.水银的,易变的adj.似水银的,光亮且流动快的
examples: For tips on cleaning up a broken CFL, see "Concerned About Quicksilver."
Quick as quicksilver to change, he was mercurial in nature and therefore unreliable.
ELEMENTAL MERCURY: The "quicksilver" pictured here in a miner's hand is used to bond to gold in a slurry.
Surfer-inspired clothing retailer Quicksilver moved back on gains it posted Thursday on rumors of an interested buyer.
Thompson also had words of praise for quicksilver full-back Emilio Izaguirre, who galloped forward at every opportunity.
